**Summary**

What does this PR change? One or two sentences.

**Why**

The use case or bug being fixed. Link the issue number if applicable (`Fixes #123`).

**How**

Brief description of the approach. Point out anything non-obvious.

**Checklist**

- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes locally
- [ ] `./gradlew compileJava` has no new warnings
- [ ] Tests added / updated for non-trivial pure code
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[unreleased]` if user-visible

**Screenshots / demo**

For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot.
